hero.headline: Hi, I'm Josue
hero.description:
Crafting web experiences with modern technologies.
Transforming ideas into interactive technological solutions.

about.label: About Me
about.title: Full Stack Developer
about.bio: I'm a passionate software developer building modern web applications. I specialize in creating performant, accessible, and beautiful user interfaces using cutting-edge technologies. I currently work as the IT department coordinator at FIDEAPECH — a state government trust belonging to SIDE (Secretaría de Innovación y Desarrollo Económico) — where I manage software development projects, technical support, data analysis, infrastructure, cybersecurity, automation and operational tasks.

projects.label: Featured Projects
projects.title: My Recent Work
projects.desc: Here are some of the projects I've built recently. As platafide, as forge, as spotlight and tracker are private projects that I can't share too much here, if needed i can explain more about them.

items.platafide: Collaborated in the creation and maintenance of an entire internal process platform for FIDEAPECH focused on departmental automation.
items.forge: Collaborated in the creation of the custom-made framework that serves as the basis for all development projects at FIDEAPECH.
items.spotlight: I created the FIDEAPECH CRM for managing employees and applicants using Forge.
items.cliknow: I was part of the Cliknow project where we created virtual assistants and chatbots for companies in Chihuahua.
items.tracker: I collaborated in the creation of a Jira-like platform for task and ticket management in the IT department at FIDEAPECH.
items.sitio: I collaborated and was in charge of the continuous updating and improvement of the FIDEAPECH website.
